scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agentdraw/styles build && pnpm --filter @agentdraw/scene build && pnpm --filter @agentdraw/server build && pnpm --filter @aidraw/agentdraw build && pnpm --filter @agentdraw/web build && pnpm --filter @aidraw/agentdraw bundle:web && pnpm --filter @aidraw/agentdraw bundle:designs
scripts.npm:pack: rm -rf npm/*.tgz && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @aidraw/agentdraw pack --pack-destination npm
